title: Functional relevance of piRNA-PIWI axis in cancers: diagnostic and therapeutic avenues.
snippet: Piwi-interacting RNAs (piRNAs) and PIWI proteins are emerging key players in the regulation of cancer gene expression and tumor biology. piRNAs (24-31 nucleotides), interact with PIWI proteins to regulate gene expressionepigenetic mechanisms, modulating cell proliferation, apoptosis, and metastasis. Dysregulated piRNA-PIWI axis is implicated across cancer t...
